name: NetNTLM Downgrade Attack
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), wagga
SIGMA Title: NetNTLM Downgrade Attack
SIGMA Description: Detects NetNTLM downgrade attack

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4657 AND (LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '%\registry\machine\system%' AND LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '%controlset%' AND LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '%\control\lsa%') AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%lmcompatibilitylevel%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%ntlmminclientsec%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%restrictsendingntlmtraffic%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY NetNTLM Downgrade Attack on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4657 AND (LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '%\registry\machine\system%' AND LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '%controlset%' AND LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '%\control\lsa%') AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%lmcompatibilitylevel%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%ntlmminclientsec%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%restrictsendingntlmtraffic%') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event description: Converted from SIGMA Rule. Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Event Name
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
